features.name: Gridfinity Base Profile
features.description: Stepped 45-degree chamfer profile (3 segments: 0.8mm chamfer, 1.8mm vertical wall, 2.15mm chamfer) for baseplate interlock. Two base pads at 42mm pitch for 2x1 grid.

features.name: Bridge Plate
features.description: Flat plate connecting the two base pads from base profile top to base height. Fills the full 83.5 x 41.5mm outer footprint.

features.name: Bin Floor
features.description: Solid floor between base height and internal floor elevation. Internal cavity starts at Z=7.2 with 2.8mm fillet radius at bottom corners.

features.name: Display Body Cavity
features.description: Wide rectangular pocket for caliper display body. 72mm (X) x 20mm (Y) x 65mm (Z). Centered in bin XY. 2mm clearance per side around 68x16mm display body. Bottom fillet at floor junction.

features.name: Pocket Transition Ledge / Finger Relief
features.description: Horizontal ledge where display cavity (72x20mm) narrows to beam slot (20x9mm). Ledge supports caliper weight. Simultaneously, a 45-degree finger relief chamfer widens the pocket from 72x20mm to 81.1x39.1mm (capped to inner cavity dimensions) over 10mm of height. Ledge at Z=72.2.

features.name: Beam Slot / Open Top Zone
features.description: Narrow slot for caliper beam: 20mm (X) x 9mm (Y) x 11.8mm (Z), offset +5.5mm in Y to center on beam position. Beam slot is surrounded by the wider finger relief opening (81.1x39.1mm) which extends to body top. Combined, these create a wide open area at the top with the beam guide in the center.

features.name: Stacking Lip
features.description: Standard Gridfinity stacking lip profile (0.7mm catch at 45-deg, 1.8mm vertical, 1.9mm at 45-deg). 4.4mm total height, 2.6mm horizontal depth. Enables bin-on-bin stacking.

printOrientation.z_direction: upward from baseplate interlock to stacking lip

specDeviations.reason: Finger relief Y setback capped to inner_y (39.1mm) to maintain minimum 1.2mm wall thickness on Y sides. The spec called for 10mm setback per side (20 + 20 = 40mm) but that would leave only 0.75mm walls in Y, below the 1.2mm minimum.
Finger relief X setback capped to inner_x (81.1mm) to maintain minimum 1.2mm wall thickness on X sides. The spec called for 10mm setback per side (72 + 20 = 92mm) which exceeds the outer shell.
